title: Version 3 Transaction Relay
description: Version 3 transaction relay, also called TRUC, adds opt-in relay rules that restrict unconfirmed transaction topology to reduce pinning attacks and make fee-bumping more reliable for contract protocols. It is a policy-layer relay mechanism rather than a consensus change.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Version 3 Transaction Relay
resources.notes: Canonical overview of TRUC, its anti-pinning goals, and its relationship to package relay and ephemeral anchors.

resources.title: BIP 431: Topology Restrictions for Pinning
resources.notes: Primary specification for TRUC transaction signaling, topology limits, and intended fee-bumping behavior.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for transaction relay, fee-bumping, and mempool policy context.
